description: TW synthetic-fixture registry. Maps each synthetic .docx to its target walker mechanism, retirement threshold, and over-fit audit provenance. Re-read by Phase G invocations to drive synthetic retirement when real-corpus coverage reaches thresholds. Initial state is empty; Phase A2 populates this file as synthetics are authored. Plan reference: /Users/chrischen/.claude/plans/structured-cuddling-parnas.md Phase A0.

status_lifecycle.active: Target mechanism not yet shipped. Synthetic drives Phase C round viability.
status_lifecycle.regression_only: Mechanism shipped; synthetic stays in harness as protected regression test.
status_lifecycle.retired: Real corpus has ≥N hits (per retirement_threshold); synthetic removed from harness manifest but build script still reproduces it for audit.
